book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. MATTHEW

verses.text: At the same time came the disciples unto Jesus, saying, Who is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven?
And Jesus called a little child unto him, and set him in the midst of them,

And said, \+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Except\+w* \+w ye be converted\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w become\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w little children\+w*, \+w ye shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w enter\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w*.

\+w Whosoever\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w shall humble\+w* \+w himself\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w little child\+w*, \+w the same\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w greatest\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w whoso\+w* \+w shall receive\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w such\+w* \+w little child\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name\+w* \+w receiveth\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w whoso\+w* \+w shall offend\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w little ones\+w* \+w which believe\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w it were better\+w* \+w for him\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w a millstone\+w* \+w were hanged\+w* \+w about\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w neck\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+add that\+add* \+w he were drowned\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the depth\+w* \+w of the sea\+w*.

¶ \+w Woe\+w* \+w unto the world\+w* \+w because\+w* \+w of offences\+w*! \+w for\+w* \+w it\+w* \+w must needs\+w* \+w be\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w offences\+w* \+w come\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w woe\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w man\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w whom\+w* \+w the offence\+w* \+w cometh\+w*!

\+w Wherefore\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w hand\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w foot\+w* \+w offend\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w cut\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w off\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w cast\+w* \+add them\+add* \+w from\+w* \+w thee\+w*: \+w it is\+w* \+w better\+w* \+w for thee\+w* \+w to enter\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w life\+w* \+w halt\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w maimed\+w*, \+w rather than\+w* \+w having\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w hands\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w feet\+w* \+w to be cast\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w everlasting\+w* \+w fire\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w eye\+w* \+w offend\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w pluck\+w* \+w it\+w* \+w out\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w cast\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w from\+w* \+w thee\+w*: \+w it is\+w* \+w better\+w* \+w for thee\+w* \+w to enter\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w life\+w* \+w with one eye\+w*, \+w rather than\+w* \+w having\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w eyes\+w* \+w to be cast\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w hell\+w* \+w fire\+w*.

\+w Take heed that\+w* \+w ye despise\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w little ones\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w That\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w angels\+w* \+w do\+w* \+w always\+w* \+w behold\+w* \+w the face\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*.
\+w For\+w* \+w the Son\+w* \+w of man\+w* \+w is come\+w* \+w to save\+w* \+w that which was lost\+w*.

\+w How\+w* \+w think\+w* \+w ye\+w*? \+w if\+w* \+w a\+w* \+w man\+w* \+w have\+w* \+w an hundred\+w* \+w sheep\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w be gone astray\+w*, \+w doth he\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w leave\+w* \+w the ninety and nine\+w*, \+w and goeth\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the mountains\+w*, \+w and seeketh\+w* \+w that which is gone astray\+w*?

\+w And\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w so be that\+w* \+w he find\+w* \+w it\+w*, \+w verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w he rejoiceth\+w* \+w more\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w that\+w* \+add sheep\+add*, \+w than\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the ninety and nine\+w* \+w which went\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w astray\+w*.

\+w Even so\+w* \+w it is\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w the will\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w little ones\+w* \+w should perish\+w*.

¶ \+w Moreover\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w brother\+w* \+w shall trespass\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w go\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w tell\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w his fault\+w* \+w between\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w alone\+w*: \+w if\+w* \+w he shall hear\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w thou hast gained\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w brother\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w he will\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w hear\+w* \+add thee, then\+add* \+w take\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w more\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the mouth\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w three\+w* \+w witnesses\+w* \+w every\+w* \+w word\+w* \+w may be established\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w he shall neglect to hear\+w* \+w them\+w*, \+w tell\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w unto the church\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w he neglect to hear\+w* \+w the church\+w*, \+w let him be\+w* \+w unto thee\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w an heathen man\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w a publican\+w*.

\+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Whatsoever\+w* \+w ye shall bind\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w earth\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w bound\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w whatsoever\+w* \+w ye shall loose\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w earth\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w loosed\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*.

\+w Again\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w That\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w of you\+w* \+w shall agree\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w earth\+w* \+w as touching\+w* \+w any\+w* \+w thing\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w they shall ask\+w*, \+w it shall be done\+w* \+w for them\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w three\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w gathered together\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name\+w*, \+w there\+w* \+w am I\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the midst\+w* \+w of them\+w*.
¶ Then came Peter to him, and said, Lord, how oft shall my brother sin against me, and I forgive him? till seven times?
Jesus saith unto him, \+w I say\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w unto thee\+w*, \+w Until\+w* \+w seven times\+w*: \+w but\+w*, \+w Until\+w* \+w seventy times\+w* \+w seven\+w*.

¶ \+w Therefore\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w* \+w likened\+w* \+w unto a certain\+w* \+w king\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w would\+w* \+w take\+w* \+w account\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w servants\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w he\+w* \+w had begun\+w* \+w to reckon\+w*, \+w one\+w* \+w was brought\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w which owed him\+w* \+w ten thousand\+w* \+w talents\+w*.

\+w But forasmuch as\+w* \+w he\+w* \+w had\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w to pay\+w*, \+w his\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w commanded\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w to be sold\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w wife\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w children\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w he had\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w payment to be made\+w*.

\+w The servant\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w fell down\+w*, \+w and worshipped\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w Lord\+w*, \+w have patience\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w I will pay\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w all\+w*.
\+w Then\+w* \+w the lord\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w servant\+w* \+w was moved with compassion\+w*, \+w and loosed\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w forgave\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w the debt\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w same\+w* \+w servant\+w* \+w went out\+w*, \+w and found\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w fellowservants\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w owed\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w an hundred\+w* \+w pence\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w he laid hands\+w* \+w on him\+w*, \+w and took him by the throat\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w Pay\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou owest\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w fellowservant\+w* \+w fell down\+w* \+w at\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w feet\+w*, \+w and besought\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w saying\+w*, \+w Have patience\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w I will pay\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w all\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w he would\+w* \+w not\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w went and\+w* \+w cast\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w prison\+w*, \+w till\+w* \+w he should pay\+w* \+w the debt\+w*.

\+w So\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w fellowservants\+w* \+w saw\+w* \+w what was done\+w*, \+w they were\+w* \+w very\+w* \+w sorry\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w came\+w* \+w and told\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w that was done\+w*.

\+w Then\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w lord\+w*, \+w after that he had called\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w O thou\+w* \+w wicked\+w* \+w servant\+w*, \+w I forgave\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w debt\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w thou desiredst\+w* \+w me\+w*:
\+w Shouldest\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w have had compassion\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w fellowservant\+w*, \+w even\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w had pity\+w* \+w on thee\+w*?

\+w And\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w was wroth\+w*, \+w and delivered\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w to the tormentors\+w*, \+w till\+w* \+w he should pay\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w that was due\+w* \+w unto him\+w*.

\+w So likewise\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w heavenly\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w do\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w if\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w hearts\+w* \+w forgive\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w every one\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w brother\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w trespasses\+w*.
